pi_items.source: Web search: 64.7743S is the latitude for Palmer Station in public geographic databases, matching within 10 meters of Wikipedia's 64.774230S.
Web search: 64.0539W is the longitude for Palmer Station, matching within 50 meters of Wikipedia's 64.052718W.
Wikipedia: Palmer Station elevation is 10 m (33 ft).
Web search: time-ok.com reports Punta Arenas latitude as -53.1548.
Web search: time-ok.com reports Punta Arenas longitude as -70.9113.
Web search: Geographic coordinate sources provide 37m for Punta Arenas (matching Wikipedia's 34-42m range).
Web search: SATCAT and N2YO confirm 25544 is ISS (ZARYA), 27607 is SO-50 / SAUDISAT 1C, and 40967 is AO-85 / FOX-1A.
Web search: SATCAT and N2YO confirm 25338 is NOAA 15, 28654 is NOAA 18, and 33591 is NOAA 19.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for gpredict_env antarctic_field_season_planning task. Verified that the task uses real-world coordinates for Palmer Station and Punta Arenas, as well as correct real-world NORAD IDs for the comms satellites (ISS, SO-50, AO-85) and weather satellites (NOAA 15, 18, 19). Discovered a critical defect: 'verifier.py' is entirely missing from the environment directory, rendering the task unscorable.
